tagline: One commit, infinite possibilities for next week
editionNote: A single commit to file-classifier-backend. Slow weeks build character.

articles.headline: file-classifier-backend logs one quiet commit
articles.deck: The backend repository receives its weekly housekeeping.
articles.body: @Apostletree42 logged a single commit to file-classifier-backend this week. No releases, no merged PRs, no open issues demanding attention. Sometimes a repository needs time to think. Sometimes the best work is the work you don't rush.
articles.illustrationPrompt: A single brushstroke on blank canvas, suggesting movement and potential without form.

closingNote: See you next week, when something probably happens.
